title: libc_setenv/unsetenv duplicated in two crates — divergence risk
description: wolftpm/src/device.rs and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs each contain identical implementations of libc_setenv and libc_unsetenv with a NOTE comment acknowledging the duplication. The rationale given is 'avoid a shared internal crate dependency.' If a bug is found in these helpers (e.g. the overwrite=1 semantics are wrong for some platform), it must be fixed in two places. A future contributor will fix one and miss the other. Options: extract to a wolftpm-sys-private helper or a very small internal crate, or add a workspace-level test that checks both are byte-identical.
